expected_behaviors: each of the six drawers slides open linearly to provide storage access
handles can be grasped to pull open drawers

part_arrangement.description: 3 rows x 2 columns of equal-sized drawers

structural_features.name: dresser_body_frame
structural_features.description: Main rectangular frame housing the six drawers, forming the top, sides, and internal dividers.

structural_features.name: front_left_leg
structural_features.description: Angled, tapered mid-century style wooden leg, approximately 15cm tall with a slight outward splay.

1.name: Directional Semantics
1.detail: Direction of translation must be specified (forward/backward/up/down)

4.name: Clearance
4.detail: Sliding part must clear surrounding geometry

6.name: Force/Torque
6.detail: Grip force must be within gripper limits (Franka: 70N max)

7.name: Contact/Friction
7.detail: Contact surfaces must have sufficient friction for stable grip

14.name: Safety Limits
14.detail: Safety limits on grip force to prevent damage

behavior_analysis.behavior: each of the six drawers slides open linearly to provide storage access
behavior_analysis.reason: Six distinct components are explicitly defined with the 'drawer' role: Drawer_top_left, Drawer_middle_left, Drawer_bottom_left, Drawer_top_right, Drawer_middle_right, Drawer_bottom_right. These components are suitable for implementing linear sliding behavior for storage.

behavior_analysis.behavior: handles can be grasped to pull open drawers
behavior_analysis.reason: Six distinct components are explicitly defined with the 'handle' role, each corresponding to a drawer (e.g., Drawer_top_left_handle for Drawer_top_left). The 'handle' role is appropriate for supporting grasping interactions.

front_face_layout.name: Top_drawer_row
front_face_layout.description: Contains two drawers: Drawer_top_left and Drawer_top_right.

front_face_layout.name: Middle_drawer_row
front_face_layout.description: Contains two drawers: Drawer_middle_left and Drawer_middle_right.

front_face_layout.name: Bottom_drawer_row
front_face_layout.description: Contains two drawers: Drawer_bottom_left and Drawer_bottom_right.

front_face_layout.name: Top_drawer_row
front_face_layout.description: Contains two drawers: Drawer_top_left and Drawer_top_right.

front_face_layout.name: Middle_drawer_row
front_face_layout.description: Contains two drawers: Drawer_middle_left and Drawer_middle_right.

front_face_layout.name: Bottom_drawer_row
front_face_layout.description: Contains two drawers: Drawer_bottom_left and Drawer_bottom_right.

recommendations: Assign unique and correct `position` values to each drawer component, ensuring they are properly aligned within the main frame and distinct from each other, allowing for linear sliding.
Assign unique and correct `position` values to each handle component, ensuring each handle is attached to its corresponding drawer and is reachable for grasping.

Drawer_bottom_right.computation_notes: Drawer slide mechanism with concealed soft-close dampers. Damping based on 0.594m slide length and wood drawer mass ~8kg.

Drawer_middle_right.computation_notes: Drawer slide mechanism with concealed soft-close dampers. Damping based on 0.592m slide length and wood drawer mass ~8kg.

Drawer_middle_left.computation_notes: Drawer slide mechanism with concealed soft-close dampers. Damping based on 0.59m slide length and wood drawer mass ~8kg.

Drawer_bottom_left.computation_notes: Drawer slide mechanism with concealed soft-close dampers. Damping based on 0.595m slide length and wood drawer mass ~8kg.

Drawer_top_left.computation_notes: Drawer slide mechanism with concealed soft-close dampers. Damping based on 0.59m slide length and wood drawer mass ~8kg. No spring torque needed as slides are horizontal.

Drawer_top_right.computation_notes: Drawer slide mechanism with concealed soft-close dampers. Damping based on 0.592m slide length and wood drawer mass ~8kg.
